name: The Seven Deadly Sins. 𒅒
description:
︶꒦︶꒷︶︶꒷꒦︶︶︶꒷꒦‧ ₊˚・

Hello! This is a multiple bot, containing some of the seven deadly sins + Elizabeth and Hawk. I didn't do Escanor and Merlin because I thought there would be too many people, haha! The bot may have some problems generating meaningless responses due to the API or LLM, so don't blame me for that! I was inspired by some multiple bots here at Janitor, so I give credit to the appropriate creators. The cover image was taken from Pinterest but I believe it is original to the anime. Have fun, hon! ✨
